name: create_conversation
description: Create a new conversation in a Help Scout mailbox. This starts a new support thread with an initial message (thread). The customer is notified via email automatically.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: The subject line of the conversation.

parameters.name: customer
parameters.description: Customer object with at least an email address.

parameters.name: mailboxId
parameters.description: The ID of the mailbox to create the conversation in.

parameters.name: threads
parameters.description: Array of thread objects. Each must have 'type' ('customer' or 'reply') and 'text' (the message body).

example.text: I need help with my account settings.

threads.text: I need help with my account settings.
